title: UI locale file
description: All user-interface strings for one language. Adding a language to the app means adding one file that validates against this schema. Design decisions: (1) flat dot-namespaced keys (tab.home, quiz.correct) — trivial to diff, translate, and parity-check across languages; (2) {placeholders} in braces are substituted at runtime and must match across all locales for the same key; (3) the validator enforces exact key parity between every locale file, so a missing translation is a build failure, never a silent English fallback surprise.
